summary: Iteration 9 Testing Complete: Cart email removal, Order emails via SMTP, Dashboard Supabase migration. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All flows verified. Fixed bug: checkout-started endpoint required email (now optional).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: CheckoutStartedCreate.customer_email was required but frontend no longer sends it (email removed from cart). Made it Optional[str] = None
Dashboard endpoint at line 1759 uses Supabase optimized queries with server-side date filtering
Order creation in orders_supabase.py sends notification emails to owner on order_placed event
Payment webhook at /api/webhook/mollie sends confirmation email to customer and notification to owner on 'paid' status
Product images verified: 14+ images loading from Supabase Storage (qoykbhocordugtbvpvsl.supabase.co)
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during backend tests (customer emails: test@droomvriendjes.nl, test2@droomvriendjes.nl)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 changes verified: 1) CartSidebar no longer has email input - checkout flow works without it, 2) Checkout page at /checkout has full address form with email collection, 3) Order emails sent via TransIP SMTP (configured in backend/.env), 4) Dashboard uses Supabase with optimized .select() queries and server-side date filtering, 5) Email Templates accessible via /admin/email-templates sidebar link

cart_email_removal.details: CartSidebar.jsx no longer contains email input field. Afrekenen button navigates directly to /checkout. Verified via Playwright screenshot.

checkout_page.details: /checkout page loads with email field (E-mailadres), address form (Voornaam, Achternaam, Adres, Postcode, Plaats), phone (optional), and comments section

endpoints_tested: POST /api/orders - Creates order in Supabase, returns order_id
GET /api/orders/{id} - Retrieves order with items from Supabase
POST /api/checkout-started - Now accepts requests without customer_email (fixed)

order_notification_emails.details: orders_supabase.py has _send_email, _send_order_confirmation, _send_order_notification functions. Emails triggered on order_placed and payment_success events via webhook.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/admin/dashboard?days=30 - Returns stats, recent_orders, popular_products from Supabase

admin_dashboard_ui.details: Dashboard loads with KPI cards (Omzet, Orders, Bezoekers, Email Rate), revenue chart, Top Producten, Kanalen, Live Feed, AI Signalen

email_templates_navigation.details: Admin sidebar 'Email Templates' link navigates to /admin/email-templates. Page shows template cards with variables.

product_images_supabase.details: 14+ images on homepage loading from Supabase Storage (qoykbhocordugtbvpvsl.supabase.co)

bug_fixed.root_cause: CheckoutStartedCreate pydantic model had customer_email as required field, but frontend CartSidebar no longer sends email (removed per requirements)
bug_fixed.fix: Changed customer_email to Optional[str] = None in server.py line 863. Updated checkout_started function to handle None email.

tests_executed: Frontend: Homepage loads with Supabase images (14+) - PASS
Frontend: Cart sidebar opens without email input - PASS
Frontend: Afrekenen button navigates to /checkout - PASS
Frontend: Checkout page has email and address form - PASS
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads with live data - PASS
Frontend: Email Templates link navigation - PASS
